intro.bio: Data Engineer focused on building scalable data platforms, APIs, and analytics solutions. Experienced in ETL, data modeling, and BI to deliver reliable data systems and actionable insights.

aboutMe.title: About Me
paragraphs: I transform complex, multi-source datasets into reliable data platforms, clean models, and analytics that stakeholders understand and trust.
My approach combines strong data engineering fundamentals with practical BI delivery, from ETL and APIs to dashboards and governance, so teams can move faster with confidence in their numbers.
aboutMe.quote: Great data work is not just about pipelines, it is about making insights accessible, repeatable, and trusted across the business.

highlights.title: Scalable Data Platforms
highlights.description: Centralized models and pipelines that unify data across systems.

highlights.title: BI & Dashboards
highlights.description: Power BI reporting that turns metrics into clear decisions.

highlights.title: ETL & Pipelines
highlights.description: Automated ingestion and transformation for reliable workflows.

highlights.title: AI & Machine Learning
highlights.description: Machine Learning models and AI agents to support data-driven decision-making.

experience.title: Backend & Data Platform Developer
experience.subtitle: Fractal Investors
highlights: Developed a scalable backend application using FastAPI, building RESTful APIs and integrating with PostgreSQL for robust data storage and querying.
Containerized the backend with Docker and deployed it on Azure Cloud to ensure consistent environments and reliable deployment.
Used Git for version control across application code and dbt models, enabling collaborative development and managed data transformation workflows.

experience.title: Power BI Developer
experience.subtitle: Fractal Investors
highlights: Developed financial reporting dashboards using Power BI connected to PostgreSQL, delivering interactive insights for business and financial analysis.
Implemented Row-Level Security (RLS) and managed workspace access to ensure secure, role-based data visibility for different stakeholders.
Built custom visuals and deployed reports through Microsoft Fabric for scalable distribution.

experience.title: Senior Data Management Engineer
experience.subtitle: E-Finance
highlights: Designed centralized data models to unify data across the E-Finance Investment group, enhancing the Fees Profile model and improving consistency of enterprise data.
Integrated data from multiple ERP systems using APIs and ETL pipelines, with a strong focus on automation and reliable data workflows.
Implemented version control for SSAS solutions and improved monitoring to reduce infrastructure costs and optimize performance.

experience.title: Data Management Engineer
experience.subtitle: E-Finance
highlights: Developed and maintained analytical reports and dashboards using Power BI, Power BI Report Server, and Jaspersoft.
Built and optimized data models and queries across SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB using SSAS and DAX.
Used Python to build ETL pipelines, perform data parsing, and develop machine learning models to support data-driven decision-making.

education.description: Part-time MBA focused on digital transformation, business strategy, digital marketing, and data-driven decision-making.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology of Biomedical Engineering
education.school: Menoufia University — Faculty of Applied Medical Sciences
education.description: Bachelor of Technology in Biomedical Engineering emphasizing medical device development, signal processing, and healthcare technology.

awards.title: BI Delivery Excellence
awards.description: Recognized for scalable Power BI reporting and secure, stakeholder-ready analytics delivery.

awards.title: Platform Innovation
awards.description: Led backend and data platform work combining FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and cloud deployment practices.

awards.title: Data Modeling Impact
awards.description: Centralized enterprise data models that improved consistency and accessibility across investment systems.

awards.title: Cross-Team Collaboration
awards.description: Bridged engineering, finance, and business teams through reliable pipelines and clear documentation.

items.name: Product Manager
items.quote: Karim consistently turned fragmented sources into trustworthy analytics. Dashboards were clear, stakeholders finally trusted the numbers, and delivery stayed predictable throughout the project.

items.name: BI Lead
items.quote: Strong execution from data modeling to dashboard delivery. He bridged engineering and business teams well and left us with models we could maintain after handoff.

items.name: Engineering Manager
items.quote: Reliable backend and data platform work with clear ownership. Pipelines were well documented, issues were handled proactively, and the team could move faster with confidence.

hireMe.heading: Let’s Work Together
hireMe.subtitle: If you need a data engineer to build reliable pipelines, clean data models, and practical analytics solutions, let's work together.
